messages.content:
صحح Welcome
Your plan is already updated and activated from the moment you sign up for it
Do you have any problem downloading files?
Please try once to download the designs you like, and if you encounter any download problems, please feel free to contact me immediately.
Thank you for being a member of our community

Sarah.

Corrected:

Welcome! 

Your plan has already been updated and activated from the moment you signed up for it. Have you encountered any issues when trying to download files? Please try downloading the designs you like and, if there are any problems, do not hesitate to contact me immediately. 

Thank you for being a member of our community. 

Sincerely, 

Sarah.

صحح Hi mido!

Your plan is already updated and activated from the moment you sign up for it and pay the subscription fee. Did you encounter any problems when trying to download files? Please try to download the designs you like, and in case of any problems, feel free to contact me immediately.

Thank you for being a member of our community.

sincerely,

Sarah.

Corrected:

Hi Mido,

Your plan has already been updated and activated from the moment you signed up and paid the subscription fee. Have you encountered any issues when trying to download files? Please try downloading the designs you like, and if any problems arise, feel free to contact me immediately. 

Thank you for being a valuable member of our community.

Sincerely,

Sarah.

اجعل هذه الرساله اكثر ود Hi Mido,

Your plan has already been updated and activated from the moment you signed up and paid the subscription fee. Have you encountered any issues when trying to download files? Please try downloading the designs you like, and if any problems arise, feel free to contact me immediately.

Thank you for being a valuable member of our community.

Sincerely,

Sarah.

تمام، هذه هي النص الذي يمكنك إرساله بشكل أكثر ود:

مرحبا يا ميدو!

أردت فقط تذكيرك بأن خطة اشتراكك قد تم تحديثها وتنشيطها عند اشتراكك ودفع رسوم اشتراكك. هل واجهت أي مشاكل عند محاولة تنزيل الملفات؟ يرجى محاولة تنزيل التصاميم التي ترغب بها وإذا واجهت أي مشاكل، فلا تتردد في الاتصال بي على الفور.

نحن نقدر كثيرا وجودك كعضو في مجتمعنا، ونتطلع إلى خدمتك بأفضل ما لدينا.

تحياتي الحارة،

سارة.

ترجم هذا الى اللغه الانجليزيه مرحبا يا ميدو!

أردت فقط تذكيرك بأن خطة اشتراكك قد تم تحديثها وتنشيطها عند اشتراكك ودفع رسوم اشتراكك. هل واجهت أي مشاكل عند محاولة تنزيل الملفات؟ يرجى محاولة تنزيل التصاميم التي ترغب بها وإذا واجهت أي مشاكل، فلا تتردد في الاتصال بي على الفور.

نحن نقدر كثيرا وجودك كعضو في مجتمعنا، ونتطلع إلى خدمتك بأفضل ما لدينا.

تحياتي الحارة،

سارة.

Hello Mido,

I just wanted to remind you that your subscription plan has been updated and activated as soon as you signed up and paid the subscription fee. Have you encountered any issues when trying to download files? Please try downloading the designs you like and if you face any problems, do not hesitate to contact me immediately.

We highly value your membership in our community and we look forward to providing you with the best service possible.

Warm regards,
Sarah.

اجعل هذه الرساله اكثر ود باللغه الانجليزيه "Hi Mido,

Your plan has already been updated and activated from the moment you signed up and paid the subscription fee. Have you encountered any issues when trying to download files? Please try downloading the designs you like, and if any problems arise, feel free to contact me immediately.

Thank you for being a valuable member of our community.

Sincerely,

Sarah."

Sure, here is the friendlier version:

Dear Mido,

I hope this message finds you well! 

I just wanted to remind you that your subscription plan has been updated and activated as soon as you signed up and paid the subscription fee. Have you faced any difficulties while downloading files? Please try to download the designs you like, and if you experience any challenges, don't hesitate to reach out to me right away.

We truly value your presence in our community, and we want to make sure you enjoy your membership experience to the fullest.

Thank you for being such a valuable member, and let me know if there's anything I can assist with.

Warmest regards,
Sarah.
صحح Dear Jody Pelasky

Corrected: 

Dear <PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PERSON>,
هل هذا الرد صحيح Hi Jody Pelasky,
نعم، إنه ردي لـ Jody Pelasky.
ترجمه بالانجليزي
"ترجمه" can be translated into English as "translation". Did you mean to ask me to translate a certain phrase or sentence for you?
ترجم "مرحبا Jody Pelasky"
"مرحبا Jody Pelasky" can be translated to "Hello <PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PERSON>" in English.

صحح This happened because you signed up and then tried to pay twice
The first time the payment failed and the second time the payment was completed successfully
As for this message, do not worry about it and do not pay any attention to it, you are now already subscribed and your account is activated successfully

Corrected: 

This happened because you signed up and attempted to pay twice. The first payment failed, whereas the second payment went through successfully. 

Please don't worry about the message you received earlier and disregard it. You are already subscribed, and your account has been activated successfully.

اجعل هذه الرساله اكثر ود This happened because you signed up and tried to pay twice. The first batch failed, while the second went through successfully.

Please don't worry about the message you received earlier and ignore it. You are already a subscriber, and your account has been activated successfully.
I am at your service at any time if you have any other questions

Sure! Here is a friendlier version:

Hello there,

I wanted to reach out and clarify that you received a message because you attempted to sign up and pay twice. The first payment didn't go through, but the second one was successful.

Please don't stress over the message you received earlier and feel free to ignore it. I want to assure you that you're already subscribed, and your account is activated successfully.

If you have any further queries or concerns, I am always available to assist you. Just let me know how I can help!

Best regards,
